Document:
# Human
[bold]Humans[/bold] are an [bold][color=#4df]Oxygen-breathing[/color][/bold], [bold][color=#f44]Iron-blooded[/color][/bold] species; superficially resembling tall monkeys with a fraction of the body hair.
Humans have the baseline body temperature of [bold][color=yellow]37°C[/color][/bold] (~[color=yellow]310°K[/color]). They experience the effects of [bold]hypothermia at [color=#4df]-13°C[/color][/bold] and [bold]hyperthermia at [color=#f44]52°C[/color][/bold]. (~[color=#4df]260°K[/color] & [color=#f44]325°K[/color])
Humans are [bold]omnivorous[/bold], meaning they can safely digest [bold]meat and plant based foods[/bold], but they [bold]can't stomach raw meat or blood[/bold].
Their bodies can process [bold]2 reagents[/bold] at a time.
They slowly [bold]passively regenerate[/bold] all types of [bold][color=yellow]Brute[/color] damage[/bold], and individually [bold][color=#f44]Heat[/color] damage[/bold].
Human names typically follow a "[bold]Firstname Lastname[/bold]" pattern.
